MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-27-2004 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-20-2004 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-27-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Charles Mark Humbert, Esq. for Plaintiff
Chris Wong, Property Manager for Plaintiff, The Mills Building
Joel K. Belway, Esq. for Defendant
Dawn D. Cortland, M.D., Inc.


Unlawful detainer settlement conference held. The parties entered into written stipulation for entry of judgment and court judgment that was signed in open court by the JPT. The terms of the agreement were put on the record as follows:
Plaintiffs awarded possesion of the premises located at 220 Montgomery Street, Ste. 1212, San Francisco, CA 94104 as of Feb. 15, 2004
Lease is declared forfeited.
Plaintiffs are entitled to monetary judgment in the total amount of $52,653.35
JPT: Lawrence Curtice Clerk: Marjorie Schwartz-Scott CSR: Patricia Van Steenberge. (622)
